market_regime: Risk-on recovery; VIX -15.6% weekly to 16.45; tech leading (XLK +3.4% weekly); AI infrastructure supercycle confirmed by Micron record Q3 $41.46B vs $35.69B consensus; Qatar LNG force majeure creates 3-5yr structural tightness; selective deep-value software 40-70% off highs vs expensive mega-cap bifurcation

scanner_blind_spots.reason: Scanner categorizes as a utility. Missed: Tepper 13F position doubling = conviction escalation signal; Meta 20-year nuclear PPA 2600MW is the first hyperscaler-scale AI power contract in the utility sector. Scanner tracks position existence; Rick tracks delta and strategic counterparty quality.

Scanner flags uranium exposure. Missed: DoD conditional $725M loan + 10-year price floor + $1.9B VAC acquisition for vertical integration into finished magnets — announced within weeks. The government price floor de-risks the entire bear case. Scanner data lags strategic deal announcements.

Scanner treats all insider buys equally (binary flag). Missed: two co-CEOs deploying $51.4M of personal capital in the same month is 3+ standard deviations above typical insider buy signals. Dollar magnitude of personal commitment by management is the signal; scanner lacks weighting mechanism.

UK-listed medical device ADR with thin US coverage. Missed: Cevian's 5%->13.21% stake build in 4 months is a campaign trajectory (not a static position). Each sequential filing confirms escalating pressure. Scanner sees point-in-time position; Rick sees velocity and activist campaign pattern.

Conference oral presentations are time-specific catalysts happening TODAY (July 1) at ESMO GI. 82% ORR in pancreatic cancer doubles the historical chemo response rate. Scanner FDA calendar tracks regulatory submissions, not academic oncology conference session schedules at this granularity.

South African miner with NYSE ADR. Q1 2026 EBITDA +371% YoY from PGM price recovery; Fwd P/E 2.3; CFO buying at multi-year lows. US-focused scanners underweight foreign-listed companies and miss PGM sub-sector commodity cycle dynamics (separate from copper/iron ore).

25 open-market insider purchases vs zero sales in 6 months ($37M deployed). The 25:0 buy-to-sell ratio is exceptional breadth of insider conviction. Scanner sees Q2 EPS miss ($0.01 vs $0.12 estimate). Rick sees: insiders buying a fundamentals dip (avocado price normalization) that insiders believe is temporary post-Calavo integration.
